title: LEFT JOIN with virtual table on left hand side may not return all rows
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN with virtual table may not return all rows
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER NOT NULL, b TEXT DEFAULT 'default');
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE t2 USING rtree(b, x1, x2);
INSERT INTO t1(a, b) VALUES(1, NULL);
SELECT a, b FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t2 ON (t1.a = t2.b);
